name: allerton-info
description: Repair progress tracking portal for the Allerton apartment building (residents, stakeholders, relocation teams).

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.build: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client"
